title: Vibrant Spicy Mexican Rye Tacos
description: A spicy and snappy Mexican dish featuring rye, lacquer glaze, and raw friendly ingredients, served in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine rye flour, water, yeast, and salt to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Cook the rye circles for 30 seconds on each side, or until they are lightly browned and crispy.
In a small bowl, mix together lime juice, chipotle peppers, and lacquer glaze.
Brush the glaze mixture onto the cooked rye circles.
Top each rye circle with sliced radishes, chopped cilantro, and a sprinkle of salt.
Serve the tacos in a bamboo steamer, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
